calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-17-2017 Set For Trial On Dec-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2017 Continued To May-31-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-06-2017 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michelle McGill (415-334-8080) for Plaintiff/ opposing party John Bautista.
Kimberly Fanady (415-986-8467) for Defendants/Moving party Joel Hipol, Theodore Hipol, and Charles Hipol.

The court announces the tentative ruling and addresses the potential conflict.

Hearing is held. Argued re: Probate jurisdiction, liquidating assest, interest, and stay. The Court indicates the primary issue is the demurrer and its leaning is to overrul as to the demurrer. If there is a ruling, the 5 day rule will apply. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs JOEL HIPOL, THEODORE HIPOL, and CHARLES HIPOL's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken under submission. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)
